title: Network Debugging Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on browser-based network request debugging.

questions.question: Regarding the web development, what is the 'Network' panel in Browser DevTools used for?
options: To view your web application's network requests, including its requested URLs and status codes

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using the Network panel to identify Bottlenecks in your web application?
options: Identifying and fixing network-related performance issues like slow-loading images
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
